nodes.name: Lesser green leafbird
nodes.summary: Lesser green leafbird（Chloropsis cyanopogon）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Lesser green leafbird。

nodes.name: Lesser green leafbird
nodes.summary: The lesser green leafbird (Chloropsis cyanopogon) is a species of bird in the family Chloropseidae. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, Singapore, and Thailand. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
